description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with global image docker:stable, docker:dind service, DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375 variables, and three stages: build, test, release. In the build stage add a build_docs job using python:3.9-alpine that runs `pip3 install "sphinx" sphinx_rtd_theme` then `cd docs/` and `sphinx-build source/ html/`, publishing the docs/html/ directory as an artifact that expires in 90 days. Also in build, define build_only, build_only_clang_scan_deps and build_only_static jobs that each execute `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY` followed by a `docker build . --pull` with respective `--build-arg` flags: `EXTRA_CMAKE_FLAGS="-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=DEBUG"` for build_only, `EXTRA_CMAKE_FLAGS="-DCLANG_SCAN_DEPS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=DEBUG"` for build_only_clang_scan_deps, and `EXTRA_CMAKE_FLAGS="-DBUILD_STATIC=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=DEBUG" --build-arg MAKE_VERBOSE=1` for build_only_static. Add a check_formatting job using ubuntu:bionic that installs clang-format-6.0, links it, sets CLANG_FORMAT_DIRS="src/ test/" and CLANG_FORMAT_SINCE_COMMIT="4b825dc642cb6eb9a060e54bf8d69288fbee4904", runs `git-clang-format-6.0` to detect formatting issues and fails the job if any are found. In the test stage add an e2e job using docker:dind that sets DOCKER_SOCKET and DOCKER_HOST, starts the Docker daemon, pulls the image registry.gitlab.com/buildgrid/buildbox/buildbox-e2e/new-e2e, and runs it with the host socket and project directory mounted. In the release stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, depends on build_docs, moves docs/html/ to public/, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Also in the build stage add a test_cover job using python:3-buster that installs gcovr and pycobertura, adds the Docker CLI, builds a coverage image with `--build-arg ENABLE_TESTS=1 --build-arg RUN_GCOV=1`, extracts the built project, runs gcovr to produce an XML report, converts it to text and HTML with pycobertura, stores the reports under public/coverage, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact.
